title: Basic JavaScript Strict Mode
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Strict Mode. Focus on implementing "use strict" directive correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Strict Mode
description: Create a function that uses "use strict" directive and Strict mode changes together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Strict Mode Project
description: Build a small application that applies "use strict" directive, Strict mode changes, Eliminating this coercion in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Strict Mode
description: The following code has bugs related to "use strict" directive. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Strict Mode
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with "use strict" directive and Strict mode changes.
